cta.title: Ready to launch Call of Duty: Black Ops II?
cta.description: Instant setup, mod support, and expert assistance.

faqs.question: How fast is server setup?
faqs.answer: Most servers deploy in under 60 seconds after checkout.

faqs.question: Can I install mods or plugins?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can install mods, workshop items, or plugins depending on the game.

faqs.question: Are backups included?
faqs.answer: Daily backups are available on all plans.

faqs.question: Do you provide DDoS protection?
faqs.answer: All servers include advanced DDoS filtering tuned for gaming traffic.
